item.wildterrain.mossquill_field_guide.t: Opens a compact ecology dossier for the Mossquill.
item.wildterrain.xingsing_field_guide.to: Opens a compact ecology dossier for the curious white-eared mimic.
guide.wildterrain.mossquill.title: Mossquill Field Guide
guide.wildterrain.mossquill.subtitle: 苔针兽 · gentle ruin-grazer
guide.wildterrain.mossquill.habitat: Lush caves, swamps, jungles, and overgrown ruins where moss has already taken hold.
guide.wildterrain.mossquill.behavior: Feeds on moss, follows glow berries, and rewards careful players with brief restoration buffs.
guide.wildterrain.mossquill.ecology: When mob griefing allows it, Mossquills slowly restore old stone into mossy cobblestone or mossy stone bricks.
guide.wildterrain.mossquill.animation: Look for breathing quills, ear flicks, grazing bows, sniffing, and glow-berry delight.
guide.wildterrain.xingsing.title: Xingsing Field Guide
guide.wildterrain.xingsing.subtitle: 狌狌 · curious white-eared mimic
guide.wildterrain.xingsing.habitat: Jungle canopies, bamboo groves, and lush cave mouths below dense forest.
guide.wildterrain.xingsing.behavior: Watches friendly players and sometimes copies jumps, sneaks, and sprints.
guide.wildterrain.xingsing.ecology: Carries fruit and dropped trinkets through the canopy, spreading seeds and warning small groups about danger.
guide.wildterrain.xingsing.animation: Perked ears mean attention, low crawl means cautious mimicry, tail flicks mean mischief, and high chirps mean danger.
